name: IIT Bombay
description: Premier institute for engineering and technology, known for top research and placement.
admission: Admission via JEE Advanced for undergraduate programs.
feeStructure: Approx ₹2.2 LPA for B.Tech; scholarships available for eligible students.
placements: Average package ₹20 LPA; highest packages cross ₹1 Cr.
hostel: Well-equipped on-campus hostels with mess, gym, and sports facilities.

name: IIIT Hyderabad
description: Leading institute for computer science research with a strong industry connect.
admission: Admission via JEE Main, UGEE, or olympiad route.
placements: Average package ₹25 LPA; strong recruitment from top tech firms.
hostel: Modern hostels with high-speed internet and dining facilities.

name: BITS Pilani
description: Renowned private engineering institute offering a flexible, research-oriented curriculum.
placements: Average package ₹17 LPA; consistent top recruiters.
scholarships: Merit scholarships up to 80% fee waiver.
hostel: Mandatory campus residence with vibrant cultural life.

name: IISc Bangalore
description: India's top research institute for science, engineering and interdisciplinary studies.
admission: Admission via JEE Main / NEET / KVPY for UG; GATE for PG.
feeStructure: Highly subsidized; approx ₹35,000 per year for UG.
placements: Strong research roles; PG placements average ₹22 LPA.

name: AIIMS Delhi
description: India's most prestigious medical institute for MBBS and post-graduate medical studies.
admission: Admission via NEET UG / NEET PG.
placements: Direct integration with AIIMS hospital network; specialist roles.

name: CMC Vellore
description: Highly reputed medical college known for clinical training and community service.
placements: Service commitment programs and hospital integration.

name: Shri Ram College of Commerce
description: Top-ranked commerce college under Delhi University with excellent placements.
placements: Average package ₹9 LPA from top consulting and finance firms.
hostel: Limited hostel; PG accommodation widely available nearby.

name: NLSIU Bangalore
description: India's premier law school known for academic rigor and top placements.
placements: Top corporate law firms with packages up to ₹20+ LPA.

name: University of Delhi
description: Central university with a wide range of programs across arts, science, commerce and law.
feeStructure: Highly affordable, typically under ₹25,000 per year.

name: Sir J.J. College of Architecture
description: Historic architecture college with a strong design and heritage focus.
placements: Architecture firms, design studios and government projects.

name: NMIMS Mumbai
description: Top private university for management, commerce and engineering programs.
feeStructure: Approximately ₹4 LPA per year for UG.

name: NID Ahmedabad
description: India's premier design institute offering programs in industrial, communication and textile design.
placements: Top design studios, product firms and startups.
hostel: Vibrant residential campus with design studios.
